findings.summary: SBayesRC converter wrote GRCh38 header but coordinates were GRCh37 (UKB snp.info). Zero validation against target VCF. 0% match rate on 50 models.
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: new converters must validate sample positions against target VCF before bulk run. Add assert_coordinate_sample() pattern.

findings.summary: 6 modal app logs attempts with wrong CLI flags (--follow, --tail) from v1.4 skill on older Modal version
findings.proposed_fix: Probe modal app logs -h once per session before using advanced flags

findings.summary: Multi-agent hook blocked 4 commits. Other agents re-staged files into git index between my add and commit. Required git restore --staged . before re-adding.
findings.evidence: git diff --cached showed finding_adapters.py etc. I didn't stage
findings.proposed_fix: Atomic git restore --staged . && git add <files> before every multi-agent commit

findings.summary: Assumed prs_results.json on volume was from current run. Was from previous failed run (status=RUNNING but JSON existed from prior finalize).
findings.proposed_fix: Check _STATUS.json status field after failed runs. If RUNNING, results are stale. Modal skill gotcha #19 partially covers this.

findings.summary: Progressive log polling (6+ calls with increasing timeouts) watching model loading. Should have detached and checked once after expected completion.
findings.evidence: 6+ timeout N modal app logs calls during 30min loading phase
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: for detached Modal jobs, check once at launch, wait 30min, check volume for results. Don't stream logs.
